description_text: Store Categories Business & Industrial ATV, Side-by-Side & UTV Parts Car & Truck Parts & Accessorie Golf Cart Parts & Accessories Home & Garden Sporting Goods Electric Bicycles Other Motorcycle Accessories Other Detail 4 PCS Universal Rear Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Spoiler Lip Splitter Glossy Black Specification: Condition: 100% Brand New Color: Black Material: Plastic(ABS） Type: Rear Diffuser Quantity: 4Pcs Universal Fitment: Yes Features： It is made of premium quality ABS material, which is durable using. It gives your vehicle improved protection against scratching. Easy to Install, no modification needed, convenient to use. Lightweight, easy to carry and use. Package Includes: 4 X Rear Diffuser Mounting Hardware Included If You Need The Carbon Look Universal Rear Bumper Diffuser, Click: 196771981929 Shipping: All items will be shipped out in 1 business day, no expedited service available. We ship our items to USA only(Does NOT include Hawaii, Alaska or Puerto Rico, PO Boxes/APO's). Shipping Notes: We use multiple warehouses and will select the nearest warehouse for delivery according to your order address and our inventory, Thank you for your cooperation. Contact us: Any Questions, Just feel free to contact us on eBay. We will reply you in 24 hours. Payment Method Shipping Policy Returns Policy Contact Us Payment is expected within 4 days. Product availability will not be guarantee after 4 days. Payment received on weekends or holiday will be process on the next working day. Item will be ship to the address provided in eBay/PayPal. For faster service, please update your correct address before sending payment. We accept instant PayPal Payment or Credit/Debit Card payment thru PayPal. All items paid by eCheck will be process as soon as payment clears. Feel free to contact us for more information.
